title: Teltonika RUT951 Industrial Cellular Router
description: RUT951 is a Compact LTE CAT4 router for deployment in demanding applications including mobile traffic with Wi-Fi and four Ethernet ports (1) WAN port and (3) LAN ports. This enables it to meet the needs of a wide variety of usage scenarios. Powered by RutOS, this router offers advanced customization options, automation features and superior security
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 300 Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps RF connectors (2) RSMA female, (2) SMA female LAN speed (3) 10/100Mbps SIM slot Yes SIM slots quantity 2 Power Max. power consumption [W] 7 Physical characteristics Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 287 Width [mm] 110 Height [mm] 50 Depth [mm] 100 Hardware CPU MIPS 24Kc CPU frequency [MHz] 580 RAM [MB] 128
